{{Infobox artifact
| name = Rod of Harmony
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Rod of [[Harmony]] is a staff utilized by [[King]] [[Zakareth]], characterized by its gold construction and a [[ruby]]-studded tip. While it can be used for defensive melee combat to deflect strikes, the weapon is not primarily designed for close-quarters fighting. Its magical function involves turning the innate abilities of a [[Traveler]] back upon themselves, though its effectiveness against internal powers remains uncertain. The artifact operates through a costly mechanism that requires the consumption of emotions; it can draw feelings from citizens to power other weapons, but this process eventually leaves the wielder emotionally hollow. The rod is stored within the [[Crimson Vault]] and has been handled by both [[King]] [[Zakareth]] and [[Queen]] [[Cynara]].}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Originally retrieved from the [[Crimson Vault]] by [[Cynara]], this [[Ragnarus artifact]] serves as a powerful tool of control. [[King]] [[Zakareth]] holds the object in his right fist to exert his authority. He utilizes the Rod of [[Harmony]] to force various [[Incarnations]] into submission. The artifact is specifically designed to turn the innate powers of a [[Traveler]] against themselves.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rod of Harmony]] is held in [[King]] [[Zakareth]]'s right fist.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Zakareth]] uses the [[Rod of Harmony]] to force [[Incarnations]] into line.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rod of Harmony]] is meant to turn a [[Traveler]]’s own powers against them.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rod of Harmony]] is a [[Ragnarus artifact]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20">''City of Light'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Cynara]] pulled the [[Rod of Harmony]] from the [[Crimson Vault]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
